name: Tofu Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 large onion, cut in half lengthwise and sliced
3/4 lb firm tofu, wrapped in paper towel for 15 minutes, sliced into 1/4 inch slices
5 tbsp soy sauce (mushroom variety is best)
2 tsp cornstarch dissolved in 4 tbsp cold water
3/4 lb snow pea pods, strings removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in a nonstick skillet with a little water until golden brown.
2. Add mushrooms and cook until they have released moisture and it has almost all evaporated.
3. Add garlic and ginger. Cook for 1 minute.
4. Add tofu, soy sauce, cornstarch mixture, and water. Bring to a boil.
5. Lower heat to a simmer for 5 minutes, turning tofu so that it cooks in the sauce on all sides.
6. Add snow peas and cook until crisp-tender.
7. If desired, use more cornstarch to achieve a thicker sauce.
8. Serve over rice. This recipe should feed 4 easily.
